title: Fix ElevenLabs SFX zod validation constraints
description: Tighten ElevenLabsSfxRequest schema: duration_seconds 0.5-22 (step 0.1), prompt_influence 0-1 (default 0.3), text max(5000).
close_reason: Completed implementation of Suno endpoints, ElevenLabs provider, and SFX schema fixes

title: Add ElevenLabs typed provider with 3 new schemas
description: Create createElevenLabsProvider factory for typed autocomplete. Add 3 new zod schemas: audio-isolation, text-to-speech-multilingual-v2, text-to-speech-turbo-2-5.
close_reason: Completed implementation of Suno endpoints, ElevenLabs provider, and SFX schema fixes

title: Extend Suno provider with 10 new endpoints and V3_5/V5_5 models
description: Add missing Suno API surface: extend, recordInfo, wav, vocalRemoval, mp4, lyrics, boostStyle, uploadCover, uploadExtend, midi. Also extend SunoModel literal to include V3_5 and V5_5.
close_reason: Completed implementation of Suno endpoints, ElevenLabs provider, and SFX schema fixes

title: alibaba: add negative_prompt to AlibabaImageGenerationParametersSchema
description: DashScope's wan2.7-image(-pro) accepts negative_prompt but our image-generation parameter schema omits it. Our video-synthesis parameter schema already exposes it (packages/provider/alibaba/src/zod.ts:105), so this is a per-surface inconsistency. Touch zod.ts:279-292, matching type in types.ts, matching PayloadSchema in schemas.ts, and re-record an alibaba-wan-image integration test case that sets negative_prompt.
close_reason: Added negative_prompt (max 500) and prompt_extend to AlibabaImageGenerationParametersSchema in zod.ts:279-292; extended schema.safeParse test coverage in tests/integration/alibaba-wan-image.test.ts

title: alibaba: add prompt_extend to AlibabaImageGenerationParametersSchema
description: DashScope's wan image APIs accept prompt_extend (LLM-based prompt rewriting). Our video-synthesis schema has it at zod.ts:114 but image-generation does not. Same file trio as the negative_prompt task.
close_reason: Added negative_prompt (max 500) and prompt_extend to AlibabaImageGenerationParametersSchema in zod.ts:279-292; extended schema.safeParse test coverage in tests/integration/alibaba-wan-image.test.ts

title: Add kie image pricing to @apicity/cost
description: kie marketplace publishes per-image rates for grok-imagine, nano-banana, qwen2, seedream, gpt-image, wan-2.7-image. Need: (1) PER_UNIT_RATES.kie image rows sourced from kie.ai/market, (2) extract/kie.ts mapping for image model strings, (3) compare-image-cost.mjs lineup additions

title: Refactor cost.estimate to take real upstream JSON payloads
description: Replace c.usd() with c.estimate({ provider, payload }) where payload is the exact body the user would POST to upstream. Per-provider extractors map payload -> rate-key + units. Removes per-provider sub-namespaces (c.openai.estimate, c.fal.estimate, etc.). Plan: ~/.claude/plans/lets-refactor-estimate-and-wondrous-kazoo.md

title: @apicity/cost iteration 2: unified usd() with hardcoded pricing table
description: Add top-level c.usd(req) returning USD across all providers. Uses upstream count-tokens APIs (openai/anthropic/xai/kimi) or pricing/estimate (fal) where available; bundled hardcoded rate table for fireworks/alibaba/elevenlabs/kie; returns {usd, source, breakdown, rateAsOf, warnings}. Plan: /Users/jwt/.claude/plans/nested-bubbling-globe.md
close_reason: Iteration 2 shipped: c.usd() returns USD across all 10 providers via upstream APIs (openai/xai/fal) or bundled rate table (anthropic/fireworks/alibaba/kimicoding heuristic + elevenlabs/kie per-unit + free); kimi routed to heuristic since /coding/v1/tokens/count returns 404; anthropic upstream-tokens path supported but integration test omitted (1Password ANTHROPIC_API_KEY returns 401)

title: Add @apicity/cost package — first cut
description: Cross-provider helper package that exposes each provider's existing pre-execution estimate endpoint behind a unified factory. First cut: no USD math, no rate card — just delegate to anthropic countTokens, openai inputTokens, xai tokenizeText, kimicoding countTokens, fal pricing/estimate. Plan: /Users/jwt/.claude/plans/nested-bubbling-globe.md
close_reason: @apicity/cost first cut shipped — wires up openai/anthropic/xai/kimicoding/fal estimate endpoints behind a single factory. Build + lint + 2291 tests pass.

title: Bake-off v4: add Seedance 2, Kling 3.0 4K, and HappyHorse
description: Three new columns. Seedance 2 (non-fast tier). Kling 3.0 in 4K alongside the std variant. HappyHorse with characterN syntax — needed to drop to 2 references because 4 sat in queue waiting state for 20+ minutes.
close_reason: Shipped: 7-column bake-off (Grok | Wan | Seedance 2 Fast | Seedance 2 | Kling std | Kling 4K | HappyHorse). HappyHorse documented to need fewer refs (2 instead of 4) due to KIE queue backlog with too many characters.

title: Add Kling 3.0 as fourth column in reference-video bake-off
description: v3 of the bake-off. Adds kling-3.0/video as fourth column on har-compare.html. Kling has named kling_elements (max 3) referenced in the prompt with [name]. Discovered Kling requires each element_input_urls to contain 2-4 images (man.jpg duplicated to satisfy the min).
close_reason: Shipped: 4-column bake-off (Grok | Wan | Seedance | Kling) with cheapest Kling settings (mode std, duration 5). Documented the element_input_urls min-2 quirk in the test file.

title: Add Seedance 2 Fast as third column in reference-video bake-off
description: v2 of the bake-off (v1 shipped in cbef2ed). Adds bytedance/seedance-2-fast as third column on har-compare.html with its own integration test. Discovered KIE rejects (422) when reference_image_urls and first_frame_url are passed together for Seedance — both fixtures and the beach setting must ride in reference_image_urls.
close_reason: Shipped: 3-column comparison (Grok | Wan | Seedance) with cheapest-settings recording. Found and documented the reference_image_urls/first_frame_url mutual-exclusivity gotcha for future Seedance test authors.

title: Reference-video bake-off: Grok Imagine vs Wan 2.7 on KIE
description: Build a side-by-side reference-video comparison page in the harness. Two new integration tests (kie-grok-imagine-reference-bakeoff, kie-wan-27-r2v-reference-bakeoff) upload cat1/cat2/man/beach fixtures and run each model's reference-to-video flow with its own official prompt convention (@ImageN for Grok, 'Image N is...' for Wan). New har-compare.html + --compare flag on harness-serve renders the two outputs side-by-side so we can eyeball reference mix-ups. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/now-i-want-a-squishy-narwhal.md
notes:
Implementation complete and lint-clean. Pending: user needs to record HAR fixtures (costs API credits). Next steps:
1. pnpm run dev:record -- tests/integration/kie-grok-imagine-reference-bakeoff.test.ts
2. pnpm run dev:record -- tests/integration/kie-wan-27-r2v-reference-bakeoff.test.ts
3. pnpm run harness:compare → http://localhost:3475

Files added/changed:
- tests/integration/kie-grok-imagine-reference-bakeoff.test.ts (new)
- tests/integration/kie-wan-27-r2v-reference-bakeoff.test.ts (new)
- tests/har-compare.html (new)
- tests/harness-serve.ts (added --compare flag)
- package.json (added harness:compare script)
close_reason: Shipped: side-by-side bake-off page (har-compare.html + --compare flag) with two new integration tests using each model's official reference syntax (@ImageN for Grok, 'Image N is...' for Wan). HAR fixtures recorded; preflight passes 272 files / 2283 tests.

title: Re-record HappyHorse tests with cheapest settings + poll to completion
description: Update the 4 happyhorse integration tests to use minimum-cost settings (720p, duration=3 where applicable), drop the unused reference_image from video-edit, and poll to terminal state so recordInfo shows generated outputs instead of echoing input. Then re-record HARs.
close_reason: Re-recorded all 4 happyhorse HARs with cheapest settings (720p, duration=3 where applicable), dropped reference_image from video-edit, and pollled to terminal success. All 4 recordings now contain generated video URLs in resultJson.

title: Add HappyHorse video models to kie package
description:
Add four new HappyHorse models to @apicity/kie createTask:
- happyhorse/text-to-video
- happyhorse/image-to-video
- happyhorse/reference-to-video
- happyhorse/video-edit

All four use POST /api/v1/jobs/createTask. Need: zod schemas, model-input schemas, exported types, one HAR-recorded integration test per endpoint using local fixtures (cat1.jpg, cat2.jpg, jump.mp4).
notes:
Code complete: zod schemas, types, exports, model-input schemas, and 4 integration tests added.
Recordings: 1/4 captured (video-edit). The other 3 (text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video) hit code=402 'Credits insufficient' — kie account balance is -429.67 USD as of 2026-04-30. User needs to top up before re-running 'pnpm run dev:record' to capture the missing HARs.
close_reason: Code, schemas, exports, model-input schemas and 4 integration tests landed; all 4 HARs recorded with real taskIds after credit top-up.

title: Add kling-2.6/image-to-video to @apicity/kie
description: The kie package supports kling-3.0/* but is missing the kling-2.6/image-to-video model variant. Add the Zod schema, model-schemas entry, type re-exports, and an integration test per the OpenAPI spec the user provided. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/make-sure-we-have-temporal-pearl.md
close_reason: Reverted: wrong model. User wants to leave only kling-3.0; will not add kling-2.6/image-to-video.

title: Pin postcss>=8.5.10 to fix Dependabot XSS alert (#24)
description: GitHub Dependabot flagged postcss<8.5.10 (XSS via unescaped </style> in CSS Stringify output) on main. Transitive via vite -> vitest. Add a pnpm override to force 8.5.10+.
close_reason: Added pnpm override 'postcss@<8.5.10': '8.5.10' in package.json. Lockfile now resolves postcss to 8.5.10 (was 8.5.6). All 2270 tests pass.

title: Remove failing kie suno schema tests + all kie elevenlabs sub-provider
description: Standalone @apicity/elevenlabs supersedes the kie elevenlabs sub-provider. Also remove the 5 failing kie sunoGenerate schema tests (they omit callBackUrl which the schema requires; the actual API integration tests pass).
close_reason: Removed kie elevenlabs sub-provider entirely (6 integration tests, 1 unit test, HARs, schemas, types, factory wiring, model-schemas entries) and the failing sunoGenerate schema-validation tests (3 in validate.test.ts, 1 in functional/schemas.test.ts, 1 in kie-suno integration). Also removed 2 elevenlabs schema references from kie-more-models and modelInputSchemas tests. CI green: 2270/2270 pass.

title: Fix 5 pre-existing kie suno schema test failures in tests/unit/kie/validate.test.ts
description: On main (commit d464116 'Fix kie Suno endpoint schemas and add HAR-replay tests'), pnpm run test:run shows 5 unit-test failures in tests/unit/kie/validate.test.ts — sunoGenerate schema validation failures around enum values for model. Block CI on every PR. Discovered while landing the elevenlabs SFX provider.
close_reason: Failing tests removed in commit 3ce7818 along with the kie elevenlabs sub-provider cleanup. The 5 failing tests in tests/unit/kie/validate.test.ts, tests/functional/schemas.test.ts, and tests/integration/kie-suno.test.ts that omitted the schema's required callBackUrl field have been deleted. Suite is now 2270/2270 green.

title: Add @apicity/elevenlabs provider with SFX generator endpoint
description: Create new standalone provider package @apicity/elevenlabs with the latest SFX generator (POST /v1/sound-generation, returns binary audio). First endpoint of a new provider; future endpoints (TTS, STT, audio isolation) will land in follow-up PRs.
close_reason: Implementation complete: @apicity/elevenlabs provider with v1.soundGeneration endpoint, integration test, HAR fixture, and full workspace registration. All elevenlabs-specific quality gates pass (build, lint, test). 5 pre-existing kie-suno test failures filed as separate beads issue.

title: Add xAI vision JSON analysis harness test
description: Add an xAI integration test that mirrors the clipfirst-style image analysis contract used for Alibaba: human image fixture, JSON response with prompt/shot/pose fields, and a committed HAR for harness inspection.
design: Reuse the existing xai chat.completions multimodal path and response_format json_object support if present. Match the Alibaba test's prompt/shot/pose assertions and fixture choice as closely as possible.
acceptance_criteria: A focused xAI integration test records and replays a human-image analysis response with prompt/shot/pose JSON; build and lint pass; committed HAR is viewable in the harness.

title: Align Alibaba vision harness test with clipfirst JSON analysis
description: Replace the current placeholder Alibaba vision JSON integration test with a clipfirst-style image analysis test that returns prompt, shot, and optional pose fields. Use a human fixture so pose is exercised and keep the result recordable in Polly HAR for harness inspection.
design: Use the existing Alibaba chat.completions multimodal path with response_format json_object rather than adding another endpoint. Mirror clipfirst's guide in a concise inline system prompt so apicity does not depend on files from another repo.
acceptance_criteria: Alibaba vision integration test uses a human image fixture and requests JSON with prompt/shot/pose semantics matching clipfirst; recorded HAR shows the JSON analysis response; focused integration replay, build, and lint pass.

title: Add Alibaba vision harness test for pose/framing JSON
description: Add Alibaba-compatible multimodal chat input support for image analysis and cover it with an integration test that analyzes tests/fixtures/cat2.jpg for pose and framing using structured JSON output.
design: Prefer the existing chat/completions endpoint instead of adding Responses API support because Alibaba documents image understanding on chat/completions, and the repo already exposes response_format there.
acceptance_criteria: Alibaba chat completions accept OpenAI-style multimodal content arrays with image_url and text parts; an integration test sends cat2.jpg to Alibaba vision-capable chat completions and asserts parseable JSON with pose and framing fields; existing Alibaba tests continue to pass.

title: Add fal Kling Video O3 4K text-to-video endpoint
description: Add /fal-ai/kling-video/o3/4k/text-to-video endpoint: text-to-video variant of the Kling Native 4K model. Mirrors the existing image-to-video and reference-to-video endpoints. Supports prompt, duration (3-15s), aspect_ratio (16:9/9:16/1:1), generate_audio, multi_prompt, shot_type. $0.42/s.

title: Add fal Kling Video O3 4K image-to-video endpoint
description: Add support for fal-ai/kling-video/o3/4k/image-to-video in the fal provider, including request/response types, factory wiring, endpoint docs metadata, and integration coverage.

title: fal: add kling-video o3/4k/reference-to-video endpoint
description:
Add support for Kling Video Native 4K endpoint.

Endpoint: POST https://fal.run/fal-ai/kling-video/o3/4k/reference-to-video

Input parameters:
- prompt (string, optional): Text prompt for video generation
- multi_prompt (list): Multi-shot prompts
- start_image_url (string, optional): First frame image
- end_image_url (string, optional): Last frame image
- image_urls (list): Reference images for style/appearance
- elements (list): Characters/objects to include
- generate_audio (boolean, optional, default false)
- duration (DurationEnum, optional, default "5"): 3-15s
- shot_type (string, optional, default "customize")
- aspect_ratio (AspectRatioEnum, optional, default "16:9"): 16:9, 9:16, 1:1

Output:
- video (File): Generated video with url, content_type, file_name, file_size

Docs: https://fal.ai/models/fal-ai/kling-video/o3/4k/reference-to-video
close_reason: Added kling-video o3/4k/reference-to-video endpoint with types, schema, factory implementation, tests, and recording.

title: Add repo-level .opencode/opencode.json config
description: No repo-level opencode config exists today; opencode relies entirely on user-global config. Add a minimal .opencode/opencode.json that explicitly points at AGENTS.md, allowlists the bd/pnpm/git commands the beads workflow needs, and uses the opencode.ai/config.json $schema. Leave model/provider selection to user-global config.

title: Expand AGENTS.md to endpoint-workflow parity with CLAUDE.md
description: AGENTS.md (read by opencode / Kimi 2.5) is missing the "Adding a New Endpoint" recipe, the pnpm dev-loop commands, the Polly record/replay workflow, and the lint gates (URL-comment contract + endpoint-docs.tsv row). Mirror CLAUDE.md's coverage so opencode is self-sufficient without reading CLAUDE.md. Leave the auto-managed <!-- BEGIN BEADS INTEGRATION --> block untouched.

title: Show multipart prompts in harness viewer
description: Multipart upload recordings currently lose readable request-body context in the HAR viewer, so prompts for file-upload requests like OpenAI /images/edits are invisible. Persist a sanitized multipart field summary and render it in the harness summary/viewer so prompts and scalar params remain visible without exposing binary file contents.

title: Add OpenAI gpt-image-2-2026-04-21 image coverage
description: Add support/discoverability for the OpenAI image model gpt-image-2-2026-04-21 across text-to-image and image-to-image paths, and add recorded integration harness tests for each using the existing cat2.jpg fixture that matches the attached reference image.

title: Add Hunyuan Image v3 Instruct Edit model
description:
Add support for fal-ai/hunyuan-image/v3/instruct/edit endpoint to the fal provider.

Endpoint: https://fal.run/fal-ai/hunyuan-image/v3/instruct/edit
Category: image-to-image

Required fields:
- prompt (string)
- image_urls (array of URLs, max 3)

Optional fields:
- image_size (auto or named sizes or custom dimensions)
- num_images (1-4, default 1)
- guidance_scale (1-20, default 3.5)
- seed (int)
- enable_safety_checker (bool, default true)
- sync_mode (bool)
- output_format (jpeg|png, default png)

Files to modify:
1. packages/provider/fal/src/zod.ts - add request schema
2. packages/provider/fal/src/types.ts - add response type and namespace interfaces
3. packages/provider/fal/src/fal.ts - add endpoint function
4. packages/provider/fal/src/index.ts - export new types
5. scripts/endpoint-docs.tsv - add endpoint documentation
6. tests/integration/fal-hunyuan-image-v3-instruct-edit.test.ts - add integration test
close_reason: Implemented Hunyuan Image v3 Instruct Edit model with full Zod schema validation, types, endpoint function, and integration tests

title: fal: wrap xai/grok-imagine-video/edit-video
description: Add edit-video endpoint for the xAI Grok Imagine video model on fal. Takes a source video URL plus prompt to edit (e.g. 'Colorize the video'). Output resolution selectable (auto|480p|720p).

title: fal: wrap xai/grok-imagine-video/extend-video
description: Add extend-video endpoint for the xAI Grok Imagine video model on fal. Takes a source video URL (2-15s MP4) plus prompt, emits a stitched extended video. Sibling to image-to-video and reference-to-video on the same namespace.

title: fal: wrap xai/grok-imagine-video/reference-to-video
description: Add reference-to-video endpoint for the xAI Grok Imagine video model on fal. Supports up to 7 reference images with @Image1, @Image2, etc. prompt syntax. Mirrors the existing image-to-video sibling and follows the recently-added Seedance 2.0 reference-to-video pattern.

title: Fix fal Seedream v5 Lite image_size + image_urls schema gaps
description: FalSeedreamV5LiteEditRequestSchema and FalSeedreamV5LiteTextToImageRequestSchema in packages/provider/fal/src/zod.ts are missing 6 preset image_size enum values (square_hd, square, portrait_4_3, portrait_16_9, landscape_4_3, landscape_16_9) plus auto_3K, and incorrectly include auto_4K which isn't in upstream docs. Edit schema also has unbounded image_urls (upstream caps at 10).

title: Fill WAN image schema gaps in fal/alibaba
description:
Four gaps identified vs upstream WAN image docs:
1. FAL wan v2.7 T2I+Edit (pro + non-pro): cap prompt at 2000 chars, negative_prompt at 500 chars
2. Alibaba wan2.7-image: tighten size from bare string to union (enum 1K/2K/4K OR '<w>*<h>' regex)
3. FAL wan v2.7 pro T2I: add explicit width/height fields (1-14142) as alternative to image_size
4. Alibaba: verify whether prompt_extend/negative_prompt are actually honored by wan2.7-image models, then drop if not
Source: gap analysis against fal.ai and help.aliyun.com docs.

title: fal: wrap wan/v2.6 text-to-image + image-to-image
description: Upstream endpoints POST /v1/wan/v2.6/text-to-image (adds image_url style guide, max_images 1-5, returns generated_text) and /v1/wan/v2.6/image-to-image (image_urls required 1-3, enable_prompt_expansion default true, num_images 1-4). Namespace differs from fal-ai/wan/* (it's under 'wan/' directly).

title: fal: wrap wan/v2.2-a14b/text-to-image + image-to-image
description: Upstream endpoints POST /v1/fal-ai/wan/v2.2-a14b/text-to-image and /image-to-image. Adds LoRA-era parameters beyond v2.7: num_inference_steps (default 27), guidance_scale (default 3.5), guidance_scale_2 (default 4), shift (1.0-10.0 default 2), image_format (png|jpeg), loras (list). Two new factory properties under fal.wan.v2p2A14b.*.

title: fal: wrap wan/v2.7/edit-video (video-to-video editing)
description: Upstream POST https://api.fal.ai/v1/fal-ai/wan/v2.7/edit-video accepts prompt, video_url, reference_image_url, resolution (720p|1080p), aspect_ratio, duration (0-10, 0=auto), audio_setting (auto|origin), seed, enable_safety_checker. Add fal.wan.v2p7.editVideo factory property with types, zod schema, payloadSchema, URL comment, endpoint-docs.tsv row, and integration test.

title: alibaba: extend video model enum with wan2.6/wan2.5/wan2.2/wanx2.1 variants
description: zod.ts:121 currently only lists wan2.7-i2v and wan2.7-videoedit. DashScope also ships wan2.6-{t2v,t2v-us,i2v,i2v-flash,i2v-us}, wan2.5-i2v-preview, wan2.2-i2v-{flash,plus}, wanx2.1-i2v-{turbo,plus}, wanx2.1-kf2v-plus. Extend the enum and add model-specific parameter branches where they differ.

title: alibaba: wrap /image2image/image-synthesis (wanx2.1-imageedit with 10 functions)
description: DashScope exposes wanx2.1-imageedit via POST /api/v1/services/aigc/image2image/image-synthesis with 10 function values: stylization_all/local, description_edit, description_edit_with_mask, doodle (sketch-to-image), remove_watermark, expand, super_resolution, colorization, cartoon_reference, control_cartoon_feature. Largest single capability hole in alibaba. Needs a new factory property, a new schema discriminated by the 'function' field, and one integration test per high-value function (start with stylize, doodle, super_resolution).

title: alibaba: support wan2.6-image model and its enable_interleave / max_images flags
description: DashScope's /image-generation/generation endpoint also accepts model=wan2.6-image with two model-specific parameters: enable_interleave (text/image interleaved output) and max_images (1-5 in interleaved mode; n stays 1-4 in editing mode). Extend model enum at zod.ts:295 and add the two optional parameters.

title: Epic: close WAN coverage gaps across kie/fal/alibaba
description: Cross-provider WAN audit identified missing parameters and unwrapped sibling endpoints in fal and alibaba. KIE has no actionable gaps. See plan at ~/.claude/plans/find-all-the-gaps-quizzical-wombat.md for the full gap catalog. Child issues track each concrete change.

title: Implement native DashScope uploads endpoint + HAR test
description: Add GET /api/v1/uploads?action=getPolicy&model=<model> to @apicity/alibaba. This is the two-step OSS-signed upload flow (parallel to fal.storage.upload.initiate). Include a HAR integration test that fetches the policy and POSTs a real fixture (tests/fixtures/cat1.jpg) to the returned OSS host, verifying the server accepts the file.

title: Fill image/video gen coverage gaps: Seedance, WAN, Kling, Grok, image gens
description:
Add endpoints to fal and kie packages to cover model-level gaps identified in coverage analysis 2026-04-18. Scope: Seedance, WAN, Kling, Grok Imagine, and all image generation models.

fal additions (16):
- bytedance/seedance-2.0/fast/text-to-video
- bytedance/seedance-2.0/fast/image-to-video
- fal-ai/wan/v2.7/text-to-video
- fal-ai/wan/v2.7/image-to-video

- fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/master/text-to-video

- google/nano-banana-edit (i2i)
- gpt-image/1.5-text-to-image
- sora-2-text-to-video

Each endpoint: types + schema + factory wiring + URL comment + endpoint-docs.tsv entry + integration test + HAR recording. Commit per logical group.

title: Add fal wan v2.7 pro text-to-image endpoint
description: Add fal-ai/wan/v2.7/pro/text-to-image to @apicity/fal. New: run.wan.v2p7.pro.textToImage. Same schema/response as wan.v2p7.textToImage — different URL + Pro tier price.

title: Add fal wan v2.7 pro edit endpoint
description: Add fal-ai/wan/v2.7/pro/edit (image-to-image, Pro tier) to @apicity/fal. New: run.wan.v2p7.pro.edit. Same schema/response as wan.v2p7.edit — different URL + higher price tier.

title: Add fal wan v2.7 edit endpoint
description: Add fal-ai/wan/v2.7/edit (image-to-image) to @apicity/fal. New: run.wan.v2p7.edit. Requires prompt+image_urls; optional negative_prompt, image_size, num_images (1-4), enable_prompt_expansion, seed, enable_safety_checker.

title: Add fal wan v2.7 text-to-image endpoint
description: Add fal-ai/wan/v2.7/text-to-image endpoint to @apicity/fal. New run namespace: run.wan.v2p7.textToImage. Includes types, zod schema, factory wiring, URL comment, endpoint-docs.tsv entry, and integration test.

title: kie: integration test for seedream/5-lite-image-to-image
description: Spec was newly published for the image-to-image variant. Schema/registration already exists from earlier work but no integration test or HAR fixture covers it. Tighten zod constraints (prompt 3-3000, image_urls max 14) to match the upstream spec and add an integration test that mirrors the text-to-image variant.

title: Finish all non-api non-pollyjs tests for all providers
Finish all non-api non-pollyjs tests for all providers
Regenerate fal README for Kling Video O3 4K image-to-video
description: The fal provider source and tests include klingVideo.o3p4k.imageToVideo, but packages/provider/fal/README.md was not regenerated, so the API reference only shows referenceToVideo. Regenerate and commit the docs output.

title: Extend .claude/settings.local.json bd allowlist
description: Current allowlist has only bd ready / bd create / WebFetch(docs.kie.ai). Extend to cover the bd subcommands an agent uses during an endpoint task: show, update, close, dep, dolt push/pull, remember, memories, stats, preflight. Do NOT broaden beyond bd — leave git push and package installs on the default prompt path.

title: Reconcile @opencode-ai/plugin version drift in .opencode/
description: .opencode/package.json declares @opencode-ai/plugin@1.4.6 but node_modules has 1.4.3. Reconcile by reinstalling so the lockfile and declared version match. Prefer bumping to 1.4.6.

title: xai: tighten image aspect_ratio to explicit enum
description: XaiImageGenerateRequestSchema and XaiImageEditRequestSchema in packages/provider/xai/src/zod.ts currently declare aspect_ratio as z.string().optional() (permissive). Upstream /v1/images/generations accepts a fixed set of 14 values per https://docs.x.ai/docs/guides/image-generations: 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4, 3:2, 2:3, 2:1, 1:2, 19.5:9, 9:19.5, 20:9, 9:20, auto. Replace z.string() with z.enum([...]) for both image generate and edit schemas so invalid values are caught client-side. Video schema (XaiVideoGenerateRequestSchema) already uses a 7-value enum that matches upstream — leave it. No capability change; pure validation polish.

title: fal: wrap wan-vace-apps/video-edit endpoint
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-vace-apps/video-edit. Editing endpoint for the VACE model.

title: fal: wrap wan/v2.2-a14b/text-to-image/lora endpoint
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan/v2.2-a14b/text-to-image/lora. Same params as v2.2-a14b text-to-image plus full LoRA list support.

title: fal: wrap wan-vace inpainting endpoints (v2.2 fun-a14b + vace-14b)
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-22-vace-fun-a14b/inpainting and /v1/fal-ai/wan-vace-14b/inpainting. Video inpainting with masking: prompt, video_url, mask_video_url, mask_image_url, ref_image_urls, num_frames (81-241), frames_per_second (5-30), resolution, aspect_ratio, num_inference_steps, guidance_scale, sampler, shift, acceleration, video_quality, video_write_mode, interpolator_model.

title: fal: wrap wan-25-preview text-to-image + image-to-image
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-25-preview/text-to-image and /image-to-image. Preview endpoints; num_images (not max_images), otherwise v2.7-like. Two new factory properties.

title: Add kie model slugs: nano-banana v1, gpt-image/1.5-text-to-image, sora-2 t2v/i2v, kling v2-1, qwen/*, seedream-v4
description: Expand KieMediaModelSchema in kie/src/zod.ts to add slugs: google/nano-banana, google/nano-banana-edit, gpt-image/1.5-text-to-image, sora-2-text-to-video, sora-2-image-to-video, kling/v2-1-standard, kling/v2-1-pro, kling/v2-1-master, qwen/image-to-image, qwen/image-edit, bytedance/seedream-v4-text-to-image, bytedance/seedream-v4-edit. Each needs a modelInputSchemas entry in kie/src/model-schemas.ts. Add integration tests using jobs.createTask polling pattern. Refer to https://docs.kie.ai/market/ for each model's input schema.

title: Add fal kling-video v2.1 variants (std/pro/master i2v + master t2v)
description: fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/standard/image-to-video, /v2.1/pro/image-to-video, /v2.1/master/image-to-video, /v2.1/master/text-to-video. Schemas vary per docs — research each at https://fal.ai/models/fal-ai/kling-video/v2.1/*/*. Research first, then add types/schemas/factory/tests/HAR.

title: Add fal kling-video motion-control endpoints (v3 std/pro, v2.6 std/pro)
description: 4 endpoints: /fal-ai/kling-video/v3/standard/motion-control, /v3/pro/motion-control, /v2.6/standard/motion-control, /v2.6/pro/motion-control. All share schema: prompt?, image_url (req), video_url (req), keep_original_sound?, character_orientation (req enum image/video). **Blocker**: fal.run rejects data: URIs for video_url ('Video URL is invalid' 422). Need to upload the ref video via fal.serverless.files.uploadLocal or use a public CDN URL. Investigate before writing tests.

title: Add fal xai/grok-imagine-video/text-to-video endpoint
description: Third attempt failed with repeated 'TypeError: fetch failed' errors from fal.run. Video i2v works fine but t2v endpoint may be flaky or require queue-based submission. Investigate: (1) try queue.fal.run pattern with polling, (2) verify endpoint is actually live, (3) test manually with curl. Docs: https://fal.ai/models/xai/grok-imagine-video/text-to-video/api

title: Add kie bytedance/seedance-2 multimodal reference integration test
description: Upload image + mp4 + mp3 fixtures, then call createTask with reference_image_urls + reference_video_urls + reference_audio_urls for bytedance/seedance-2 multimodal mode. Use cheapest settings (480p, 4s, no audio). Poll to success and commit HAR.

title: Add kie bytedance/seedance-2 first+last-frame integration test
description: Upload two local image fixtures, then call createTask with first_frame_url + last_frame_url for bytedance/seedance-2. Use cheapest settings (480p, 4s, no audio). Poll to success and commit HAR.

title: Add kie bytedance/seedance-2 first-frame integration test
description: Upload a local image fixture via fileStreamUpload, then call createTask with first_frame_url for bytedance/seedance-2 (image-to-video, first frame only). Use cheapest settings (480p, 4s, no audio). Poll to success and commit HAR.

title: Add integration test for kie bytedance/seedance-2
description: The bytedance/seedance-2 model already has zod + model-schemas entries and is wired up via createTask. Add an integration test (text-to-video, cheapest settings: 480p, duration 4, no audio) mirroring tests/integration/kie-seedream-5-lite-text-to-image.test.ts, record a HAR, and verify replay.

title: Remove dead code: endpoint-docs-seed.mjs + wire apply-sigok-comments.mjs
description: Deleted scripts/endpoint-docs-seed.mjs (one-off bootstrap, TSV already populated). Wired scripts/apply-sigok-comments.mjs into pnpm as lint:signatures:fix. Implemented in commit 16250cb on main.

title: fal: wrap wan-22-trainer endpoints (i2v + image)
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-22-trainer/i2v-a14b and /v1/fal-ai/wan-22-image-trainer. Training endpoints (not inference). Skip unless there's a concrete user request.

title: fal: wrap wan-i2v-lora legacy endpoint
description: Upstream POST /v1/fal-ai/wan-i2v-lora. Older i2v LoRA endpoint: num_frames 81-100, frames_per_second 5-24, guide_scale (default 5), shift (default 5), aspect_ratio (auto|16:9|9:16|1:1), loras, reverse_video, turbo_mode. Defer unless there's demand.

title: bd-noremote-smoketest
description: Verify no auto-push warning after remote removal
